content.mi:
Te Tahi-o-Te-Rā:

The Guardian of Ōtara

He pukapuka mā ngā tamariki i ahu mai i ngā pūrākau o Ngāti Ngahere

Nā Te Kāhautu Maxwell

He kōrero anō mō ngā tamariki me ngā rangatahi
content.en:
Te Tahi-o-Te-Rā:

The Guardian of Ōtara

A Children’s Book Inspired by the Pūrākau of Ngāti Ngahere

By Te Kāhautu Maxwell

Retold in story form for children and young people
